relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Hidden contact with ritual uncleanness can become known and addressed.
Human uncleanness is a ritual state, not human worthlessness.
Rash words with oath can bind a person into guilt.
Repair begins with confession: naming the misalignment.
A flock offering opens the path to covering.
If the hand cannot reach that cost, birds are accepted.
The priest brings the first bird as repair offering.
The second bird rises as burnt offering, and forgiveness is given.
If even birds are beyond reach, flour becomes the offering.
A handful rises as memorial upon the fire-offerings.
Covering is made, forgiveness is given, and the priest receives provision.
Unfaithfulness toward holy things requires reparation.
Restitution plus added fifth repairs the holy loss.
Unknown misalignment can still be carried and repaired.
The guilt offering covers error that was not known.
The guilt is named before YHWH so repair can happen.

contemplative_note: Leviticus 5 is mercy scaled to the hand’s reach: confession, birds, flour, restitution, and forgiveness make repair possible for rich and poor alike.
